body: Open a temp file in $EDITOR pre-populated with the ticket's current JSON (or a template for new tickets). Validate all fields after editing before committing. Two entry points: 'new --edit' / 'new -e' to create-and-edit, and 'edit <id>' to modify an existing ticket. Full field validation (types, required fields, dep references) must pass before the commit is made; if validation fails, re-open the editor rather than discarding changes.
title: Add editor support for creating and editing tickets
